proved: credential identifiers reject traversal, whitespace, and control characters
the provider-neutral vault contract supports set, exact readback, delete, and not-found
vault errors and secret Debug output are sanitized
provider secret string storage zeroizes on drop

the live harness read the exact canary, deleted it, and independently observed not-found

product-facing key setup, replacement, or deletion
